title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on desktop computers and automates daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and applications. It is available through Claude Pro and Max subscription plans and supports workflow automation including file organization, email summarization, and task scheduling.
